mapper.select: select id, domain, prefix_type, reason, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status from resource_block_domain where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into resource_block_domain(id, domain, prefix_type, reason, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values (#{id}, #{domain}, #{prefixType}, #{reason}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status})

insert into resource_block_domain(id,domain, prefix_type, reason, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.domain}, #{entity.prefixType}, #{entity.reason}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})

insert into resource_block_domain(id,domain, prefix_type, reason, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.domain}, #{entity.prefixType}, #{entity.reason}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})
on duplicate key update domain = values(domain), prefix_type = values(prefix_type), reason = values(reason), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time), status = values(status)
